$comment: Template deck — one entry per slideType. Authors duplicate any of these into spec/slides/<deck>/NN-name.json to start a new slide. Each entry pairs the JSON template with a sibling .md authoring guide. v0.116.

slides.purpose: Hero opener with eyebrow, headline, subtitle, capsules, and ambient icon scatter.
Title + 3–10 colored capsules. Optional click-reveal targets per capsule.
Cinematic step chain (numbered nodes, focused-step description, ambient icons).
Closer / contact card. QR + meeting URL + amber-tile contact rows + socials.

$missing.$comment: Slide types without a template yet — add front-end/slide-template/<Type>.json + .md to backfill.
